zh.lifeSummary: 當John Astley Esq.於大約1423年出生在英國諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃時，他的父親Sir Thomas Astley III41歲，母親Isabel Oke38歲。他於1448年與Elizabeth Wychingham在英國諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年6月之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Astley Esq.于大约1423年出生在英国諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Astley III41岁，母亲Isabel Oke38岁。他于1448年与Elizabeth Wychingham在英国諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年6月之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Astley Esq. was born about 1423, in Melton Constable, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Astley III, was 41 and his mother, Isabel Oke, was 38. He married Elizabeth Wychingham in 1448, in Melton Constable, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died before June 1475, in his hometown.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Wychingham en 1448, à Melton Constable, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant juin 1475, dans sa ville natale.

ru.Placé, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: плакe, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Astley Esq. родился около 1423 г. в местности мелтон кунстабл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Astley III было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Oke, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wychingham в 1448 г. в местности мелтон кунстабл, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед июнь 1475 г. в его родном городе.
